summary: Update viewpoint mapping and/or Model Manager viewpoint content (REST v2.0)
description:
Updates the MM-backed mapping (`viewpoint_id` = `viewpoint_uuid`): **`primary`** and **`position`** on
`bim_viewpoints_coordination_issues`, and optionally **`name` / payload fields** via Model Manager PATCH.
Discrete fields (`camera_data`, `sections_data`, `redlines_data`, `visibility`, `render_mode`) are merged
into the current MM payload after loading the viewpoint from Model Manager, unless **`payload`** is sent
(full replace of MM payload).

Parity keys such as **`scene_id`** / **`bim_mo...

parameters.name: viewpoint_id
parameters.description:
**MM-backed:** Model Manager viewpoint UUID (`[0-9a-f-]{36}`, case-insensitive). **Legacy:** numeric
`bim_viewpoints.id` for a join row that has `bim_viewpoint_id` (no `viewpoint_uuid`).

200.description:
OK — full Model Manager viewpoint under `data` (same idea as **GET** show for MM-backed rows), with
**`primary`** and **`position`** from the join row included.

data.description:
Same shape as **GET** `.../viewpoints/{viewpoint_id}` for MM-backed rows (BIM MM `ResponsesViewpointResponse`),
with **`primary`** and **`position`** merged from the join row after a successful upd...

404.description: MM-backed mapping not found on this issue

422.description:
Empty body, only no-op fields (e.g. `scene_id` alone), invalid `position` or JSON payload fields,
or model validation failure.

502.description: Model Manager returned 5xx while patching or loading the viewpoint

schema.description:
Accepts the same optional fields as **POST create** (`viewpoint_create_request.yml`) for Model Manager content
(`name`, `payload`, discrete `camera_data` / `sections_data` / `redlines_data` / `visi...

name.description: Passed to Model Manager viewpoint PATCH (`name`) when provided.

scene_id.description: Accepted but not applied on PATCH (create-only relocation).

bim_model_uuid.description: Accepted but not applied on PATCH.

camera_data.description: When `payload` is absent — merged into MM payload as `camera` (object or JSON string).

redlines_data.description: When `payload` is absent — merged into MM payload as `markup`.

sections_data.description: When `payload` is absent — merged into MM payload as `clipping.planes`.

bim_file_id.description: Accepted but not applied on this PATCH flow.

bim_view_folder_id.description: Accepted but not applied on this PATCH flow.

snapshot_upload_uuid.description: Accepted but not applied on this PATCH flow.

primary.description: Sets `is_primary` on the coordination-issue viewpoint mapping.

position.description: Sort order on the join row; send `null` to clear when supported by validation.
